{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = The Oracle
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Oracle]] is a character hired to unravel all mysteries.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
